about.tagline: AI Consulting  ·  Commercial Strategy  ·  Operations & Delivery  ·  Business Development
about.short: Co-founder and COO of Mottum Analytica. AI consulting and operations leader with 10+ years across fintech, consulting, and mobility. Based in Madrid.
about.medium: I build and run the operational and commercial side of AI consulting projects. Co-founder and COO of Mottum Analytica — a Madrid-based AI/data consultancy serving multilateral organisations (UNDP, IDB), European public administrations, and enterprise clients across Spain and Latin America.
about.long: I build and run the operational and commercial side of AI consulting projects. Co-founder and COO of Mottum Analytica — a Madrid-based AI/data consultancy serving multilateral organisations (UNDP, IDB), European public administrations, and enterprise clients across Spain and Latin America. I lead end-to-end delivery: from closing the contract to managing the team, shipping the deliverable, and running the commercial pipeline in parallel. Generalist by design — equally at home structuring a proposal, running a stakeholder workshop, and shipping a live product. Strongest at the intersection of strategy, operations, and people.
about.linkedin: I work at the intersection of strategy and execution — building pipelines, structuring deals, and turning ideas into revenue. Co-founder and COO of Mottum Analytica, an AI and data consultancy. Previously: Uber Direct, Polestar, Capgemini Invent, Amadeus IT. 10+ years in consulting, AI/data, and operations.
about.recruiter: 10+ years in consulting and operations, with a track record of delivering AI projects for multilateral organisations (UNDP, IDB) and enterprise clients. Co-founder and COO of Mottum Analytica. Previously: Uber Direct, Polestar, Capgemini Invent, Amadeus IT. Education: IE Business School (MSc Business Analytics & Big Data), Warwick Business School (MSc Economics & Finance), Università Cattolica Milan (BA Economics & Management). Fluent in Italian, English, Spanish, French.

experience.summary: Co-founded and lead operations, delivery, and commercial strategy across AI/data consulting projects for multilateral organisations, public administrations, and enterprises.
bullets: Lead operations, delivery, and team coordination across AI/data consulting projects — multi-disciplinary teams and client relationships in Spain, the EU, and Latin America.
Closed and executed partnership agreements with the UN Development Programme (UNDP/AccLab Mexico) to embed AI tools in public institutions — total contract value ~$38k across two engagements.
Lead PM and delivery on SITA III Suriname (IDB-financed, $50,352): Central Repository Tool, CRM advisory, and live service portal for the Suriname Investment & Trade Agency.
Co-founded and launched Noetia (noetia.io, live May 2025): AI-powered public procurement platform automating licitación discovery, eligibility filtering, and bid intelligence for B2G consultancies.
Built and launched Mottum AI Academy — executive platform simplifying AI and data concepts for non-technical public-sector audiences.
Own the full commercial pipeline: prospecting (Apollo), cold outreach, pricing strategy, proposal writing, and contract conversion.
Designed and delivered AI product GTM strategy including market mapping, ICP definition, and outreach sequencing for Noetia.

experience.summary: Drove operations strategy for Uber Direct — one of Uber's fastest-growing last-mile delivery services — focusing on delivery performance, issue resolution, and cross-functional alignment.
bullets: Drove operations strategy for Uber Direct — one of Uber's fastest-growing last-mile delivery services — focusing on delivery performance, issue resolution, and cross-functional alignment.
Led deep-dive investigations into critical KPIs (delivery failures, cancellation rates, fraud signals) to identify root causes and design operational countermeasures.
Spearheaded a project to reduce high-cost drop-off cancellations: developed mitigation strategies that improved customer experience and reduced account manager workload.

Collaborated with global product teams to design scalable improvements; served as the bridge between operations, product, and commercial teams to align priorities and translate data insights into business actions.
Designed KPI frameworks and real-time dashboards for operational performance and financial risk tracking; delivered weekly executive reporting to senior stakeholders.

experience.summary: Pioneered Polestar's telematics service for B2B fleet clients in Spain from pre-launch to fully commercialised.
bullets: Pioneered Polestar's telematics service for B2B fleet clients in Spain from pre-launch to fully commercialised — the strategy and direction set during this period have since been consolidated into a live, fully developed service through strong telematics partnerships.
Led commercial strategy and launch end-to-end: built the go-to-market approach, telematics partner ecosystem, and client acquisition playbook — drove 15% B2B revenue growth in year one.
Managed the full B2B engagement cycle: prospecting, pitching, negotiation, and contract close; coordinated with product and technical teams to translate client requirements into roadmap priorities.
Built a market entry and delivery playbook that was later adopted as a template across other European markets; produced Power BI dashboards for sales leadership and executive reporting.

experience.summary: Strategy and CX consulting for top-tier clients in insurance and automotive. Led CX transformation across 10+ European markets.
bullets: Led CX and NPS transformation programme across 10+ European markets for a top-tier insurance client — managed delivery workstreams and C-level stakeholder relationships.
Developed go-to-market strategy, digital transformation roadmap, and Spanish launch plan for Polestar Iberia.
Built business cases and ROI models for digital transformation initiatives to support executive decision-making.
Ran client workshops and executive presentations, translating technical AI/data solutions into business outcomes.
Delivered BI tools and data analytics solutions for European public-sector clients.

experience.summary: Coordinated a global distributed team to deliver an AI-powered Agritech solution.
bullets: Coordinated a global distributed team of 20+ developers to deliver an AI-powered Agritech solution; end-to-end project management across multiple time zones.

experience.summary: Managed analytics platforms and customer success for B2B travel clients.
bullets: Managed a portfolio of B2B clients on Amadeus analytics platforms; primary liaison between clients and product teams — improved client engagement by 30%.
Reduced onboarding time-to-value from 6 weeks to 3 weeks via structured training and delivery frameworks.
Built client health scorecards to proactively identify at-risk accounts; managed roadmap and product adoption programmes.

referrals.name: Adrien Palumbo
referrals.title: Managing Director Spain
referrals.quote: Nico has a rare ability to bridge commercial strategy and operational execution. He was instrumental in building our Iberian go-to-market — precise, fast, and deeply reliable.

referrals.name: Javier Bordetas
referrals.title: Director
referrals.quote: What sets Nico apart is his clarity. He can walk into a complex stakeholder environment and come out with a plan that everyone buys into. An exceptional consultant.
